raw:
The diff shows unexpected changes (statusline). Let me inspect the relevant diff for the docs task.
Now let me verify the anchors against the actual code.
Code matches the documented behavior. Now verify install.sh crew-linking loop.
Install.sh loop and target dir all match the docs. Now check the unexpected statusline changes — those are out of scope.
All anchors verified against code:
- `shouldReusePersistedDraft()` returns `draft?.source === "planner"` (planner.ts:73) ✓
- Used as ternary in index.ts:1687 (`shouldReusePersistedDraft(persisted) ? persisted : await draftPlannerPlan(...)`) ✓
- install.sh crew loop `for crew in "$REPO_DIR"/extensions/*/crew/` links each `.md` per-file into `~/.pi/agent/agents/` (install.sh:48-53) ✓
- ENOENT footgun and re-install requirement accurately described ✓

The INTERNALS.md edits keep the existing structure, swap brittle line numbers for function-name anchors (as requested), and add both items in the right sections (Gate-1 flow, extension recipes, NEVER-do). CHARTER untouched — correct, planner-reuse is an internals detail. Docs-only, no code/test/AGENTS.md/models.json touched.

One observation: the working tree also contains unrelated modifications to `extensions/statusline/index.ts` and `extensions/statusline/README.md`. These are not part of this docs task and appear to be pre-existing in-flight work from a separate statusline plan (a matching plan dir exists). They are not staged as part of this task's deliverable and don't affect the INTERNALS.md change's correctness, so I'm not blocking on them — but they should not be swept into this task's commit.

REVIEW: APPROVE

NITS:
- Working tree carries unrelated `extensions/statusline/{index.ts,README.md}` changes; ensure the docs-only commit stages only `extensions/foreman/docs/INTERNALS.md` so unrelated statusline work isn't bundled in.
